title: helianthemum × chevallieri
intro: Helianthemum × chevallieri, also known as Rockrose, is a hybrid of the Helianthemum nummularium and Helianthemum alpinum species, belonging to the Cistaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum × chevallieri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other respiratory issues.
